creator: th@cis.ibaraki.ac.jp
text:
When i try to install ssh2 using ports, an error occurs.
It goes

===>  Installing for ssh-2.0.13
===>   ssh-2.0.13 depends on executable: ssh1 - found
Making install in lib
Making install in sshmath
Making install in tests
SHELL@:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.

How-To-Repeat: cd to /somehwere/ports/security/ssh2
and make install
